programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Beth, 68, is rushed to A&E after falling down her stairs and breaking her ankle. Leigh, 67, has head injuries after being knocked off his bicycle in a hit-and-run incident.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Europe's biggest brewery. Kate Quilton challenges Matt Tebbutt to make crumpets. Plus: why is maple syrup so pricey.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Themis and Paolo love the beaches of Kapparis in Cyprus and want to buy their very own holiday home there. Jasmine Harman shows them five amazing properties for their £180,000 budget.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Gaynor offers a warm welcome to her guests at the Nateby Inn B&B in Cumbria. A cask-rolling competition turns out to be a barrel of laughs, but one guest hogs the limelight at dinner.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Graham and Julia host at Outfields Farm B&B in Ravensden, Bedfordshire, where they treat their guests to an adrenaline-fuelled afternoon at an indoor skydiving centre.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Bob Osborne takes a laid-back approach to running the At Home B&B in Chiswick, west London. His guests appreciate the art in his communal living space, but they're soon dishing the dirt.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Andrew and Clare host at the Ammonite Lodge guest house in Chard, Somerset, where they hope to bowl their guests over with a traditional game of skittles.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and everyone meets for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid and who's been crowned the best B&Bers.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Jonathan and Deborah are building a semi-subterranean, Hollywood Hills-style mansion with a swimming pool on a hemmed-in site in north London. But what will the neighbours think.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Kevin McCabe, an exponent of the ancient art of cob building, who wants to construct a castle entirely of mud. The huge scale of the task soon becomes clear.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Carol longs to buy a holiday home on the beautiful island of Lanzarote for all her family to enjoy. Can Jasmine Harman find her perfect place on the buzzing east coast for £150,000.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: PR manager Emmy hopes to impress her guests with locally sourced Somerset produce. But she has a disaster with her hollandaise sauce.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Radio DJ Steve serves up a cross between comfort food and fine dining. But he feels the pressure, and an unwanted ingredient ends up on one guest's plate.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Diminutive forklift driver Mel plans an exotic menu, including her version of duck vindaloo, and surprises her guests by breaking into song.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business owner and muscleman Alan hopes to create a Zen evening. But with rotten beans, tofu cheesecake and soggy noodles on the menu, it could be a recipe for disaster..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Car dealer Andy is confident that his fine dining and swanky home will give his night the edge. But Mel isn't afraid to tell him exactly what she thinks of his fancy food.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins in Newquay, where Oleg and Emma are banking on the amazing sea views and an afternoon of surfing setting them apart.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Everything's going superbly at Mandy and Elly's plush Devon glampsite... So why do they end up shocked by their scores.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stuart and Amy offer a great big slice of vintage Americana at the Tin Can Retreat in Ceredigion. But could cleanliness complaints derail their bid for victory.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Steve and Mandy's classic country pub in Devon for the week's final visit, where a belly-busting breakfast could prove their saviour.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day brings with it a chance to debate that most sacrilegious of all B&B faux pas - a short and curly in the bedsheets.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Motorcyclist Michelle, who's 50, is rushed to A&E after crashing headfirst into a lamp post. Eleanor, who's due to give birth in a week, has cut her thumb on a cleaver.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tony has fallen headfirst onto a tiled floor while doing DIY. Charlie was assaulted on his way home from a night out. And Lucy, 10, has been having seizures for 48 hours.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics battle to save cyclist Graham's partially amputated leg. And some strong pain relief results in unexpected hilarity following a serious footballing injury.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams help Lesley, who's been seriously injured in a car crash in Northumberland. Plus, a cyclist has had a nasty crash in a remote part of Cumbria.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Motorcyclist Michelle, who's 50, is rushed to A&E after crashing headfirst into a lamp post. Eleanor, who's due to give birth in a week, has cut her thumb on a cleaver.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tony has fallen headfirst onto a tiled floor while doing DIY. Charlie was assaulted on his way home from a night out. And Lucy, 10, has been having seizures for 48 hours.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Some favourite investigations. Jimmy Doherty visits Spain to ask how much orange is in orange squash, Matt Tebbutt runs across a pond of custard and Kate Quilton lifts the lid on Marmite.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: The first festive host, Rachel Speight-McGregor, plans to impress her guests with a full-on Christmas night including carol singers.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: The second host, laid-back junior doctor Gyles Morrison, serves up a Caribbean take on a traditional Christmas dinner. But some eccentric behaviour raises eyebrows.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: It's the third day of the Christmas dinner party competition, and vegetarian host Nicola Gregory hopes to convert four carnivores with her meat-free festive menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: Harry Baines, who's 23, wants to prove to his rivals that his youth doesn't mean he can't cook, and serves up fiery focaccia, duck in blankets and moreish mince pies.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me Christmas
programme.desc: Estella Nicholson hosts the final night in her own pub, serving up classic pub grub with a festive twist.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Joe and Kirsty want to swap their Hampshire house for a forever home in the warmer climes of inland Valencia in Spain. Can Jean Johansson deliver their dream place for £280,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Marion and Tracey dream of owning a holiday home in Corralejo on Fuerteventura, to enjoy getaways with their two grown-up daughters. Can Jasmine Harman find the perfect place for £120k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mark and Peter want a property near Maspalomas on their dream island of Gran Canaria, to enjoy getaways with their families and cockapoo, Rosie. Danni Menzies shows them what £80k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sue and Ali are relocating from Weston-super-Mare to the whitewashed towns and villages of Almería. Can Ben Hillman find their perfect place with plenty of land for £70,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Catherine want a fresh start in France's Loire Valley and dream of buying a home where they can also host paying guests. Can Jasmine Harman find their perfect place for £100k.

programme.title: George Clarke's Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Sam and Jimmy have grand renovation ambitions for their gigantic pie factory in Lancashire. But with endless funding issues, is it all just pie in the sky.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Sue and Richard's beautiful home in Mapperley is no longer suitable since Richard had a cycling accident. Can Kirstie make it accessible? Or should they list it.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Dorset, where creased bedding and unwrapped biscuits prove problematic at Philip and Jimmy's 17th-century country inn, the Fox and Hounds.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Despite some excellent first impressions at Matthew and Moira's Surrey glampsite, Milberry Green Meadows, the great outdoors soon leave one pair longing for the great indoors.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In Dorset, former Mayfair chef Bradley's eggstensive culinary eggsperience has everyone eggspecting an eggsceptional breakfast at The Lord Bute. But then one guest sends back his eggs.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's last visit is to mum and son Prity and Kyle's aparthotel, The Pocklington, in Leicester, where parking problems soon put the brakes on their chances.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Cleanliness has been top of the agenda for most of this week's competition. So the B&Bers will be keen to give each other a good dusting down on payment day.

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: The Royal Melbourne doctors battle to stabilise a man whose vehicle rolled over multiple times. And a farmer has been trapped under hay bales in a freak accident.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Jack, 11, has been hit by a motorbike while walking to his first day at secondary school. He managed to push his friend out of the way but has sustained a fractured skull.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tulsi, 12, is airlifted to St George's after falling from a cliff near Hastings. Bus driver Adam, 39, faces lengthy emergency surgery after his motorbike collided with a car.

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: The Royal Melbourne doctors battle to stabilise a man whose vehicle rolled over multiple times. And a farmer has been trapped under hay bales in a freak accident.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Jack, 11, has been hit by a motorbike while walking to his first day at secondary school. He managed to push his friend out of the way but has sustained a fractured skull.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Tulsi, 12, is airlifted to St George's after falling from a cliff near Hastings. Bus driver Adam, 39, faces lengthy emergency surgery after his motorbike collided with a car.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of favourite investigations. Jimmy Doherty finds out what gives piquanté peppers their sweetness. Kate Quilton investigates potentially dangerous levels of mercury in tuna fish.
